ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 96% Irish Chicken, 4% Spicy Mexican Style Glaze (Spices [Red Chilli Pepper, Ground Black Pepper, Chipotle Chilli, Smoked Paprika, Turmeric], Maize Starch, Sugar, Yeast Extract, Salt, Dried Onion, Dried Garlic, Smoke Flavouring, Sunflower Oil, Tomato Powder, Spirit Vinegar Powder, Natural Flavourings, Acid: Citric Acid; Oregano).
product_name: Spicy Mexican Style chicken thigh kebabs
